'''Shenayag''' was a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] in the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] who served as an instructor at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] alongside [[Borthis]], [[Hezzoran]], [[Kas'im]], [[Orilltha]], and [[Qordis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
